subcodes.first_line: O loving friends! Mihtar Soroush Bahram Khorramshahi hath written a letter concerning those dear companions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان مهتر سروش بهرام خرمشاهی نامه ای نوشته و از آن یاران دل و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @praise of Eastern values; culture, @thankfulness; gratitude, @music and singing, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
